历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 10968, 10409, 21591, 17415, and 10992 respectively. In 2023, there was an abnormal significant drop (21591), which recovered to 17415 in 2024 and further to 10992 in 2025, showing a forward trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 10992 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Inner Mongolia: 35 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 40 in 2025; 35 in 2026, a reduction of 5 (-12.5%) compared to 2025. Reduced enrollment means decreased supply, theoretically easing competition slightly, with a tendency for ranking numbers to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been around 86–92 in recent years (86th in 2021 → 92nd in 2026), slightly declining but still among the national top 100, and firmly among the top tier of normal universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident of a professor in the School of Liberal Arts, which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, rated as 'average', with moderately low exposure on short video platforms and no obvious popularity signal. No records of cutoff score gaps or crashes. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline; Education, Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Physics and other disciplines are relatively strong, with traditional advantages among normal universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain stable. Teacher training/education majors show divergent popularity but remain a solid choice overall. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Inner Mongolia Gaokao is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the total of about 116,000 for Physics + History categories in 2025. The substantial increase in candidate scale will intensify overall competition and push ranking numbers higher. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Central China; its enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is moderate (35–41), accounting for a small proportion of the university's total enrollment, with no obvious regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10992, a 12.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 (which decreases ranking numbers), a significant increase of about 32% in Inner Mongolia candidate numbers (which increases ranking numbers), and a somewhat negative reputation, the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate increase offset each other, but the candidate increase far exceeds the enrollment reduction, intensifying overall competition. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 10218, with a range of 9718–10718.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hunan Normal University recruits independently for medical programs in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region. The lowest ranking in 2021 was 16351 (total enrollment 10), in 2024 it was 17201 (total enrollment 7), and in 2025 it was 13155 (total enrollment 5). From 2021 to 2024, the ranking number increased from 16351 to 17201, indicating eased competition; however, in 2025, the ranking number dropped significantly to 13155, showing intensified competition. In 2026, the total enrollment for medical programs is 5 (Clinical Medicine 3, Preventive Medicine 2), unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a 211 Project university and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. It is characterized by teacher education, but its Medical Department (Xianjiahu Campus) also has a certain accumulation in medical talent cultivation. As a key provincial university in Hunan, it enjoys high visibility and recognition nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has remained high, with Clinical Medicine being particularly competitive as a hot major. Hunan Normal University's Medical Department offers only two medical programs in Inner Mongolia: Clinical Medicine and Preventive Medicine, with a small enrollment scale (only 5 students). The plan is stable, and the supply-demand relationship is relatively tight.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors, after a significant drop in rankings in 2025, a moderate rebound is expected in 2026. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 12955, with a fluctuation range of 12455 to 13455. It is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.
